protein_name: High affinity receptor for semaphorins 3C, 3F, VEGF-165 and VEGF-145 isoforms of VEGF, and the PLGF-2 isoform of PGF. (Microbial infection) Acts as a receptor for human cytomegalovirus pentamer-dependent entry in epithelial and endothelial cells. Belongs to the neuropilin family. 6 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
